title: anthemis abrotanifolia
intro: Anthemis abrotanifolia, also known as southern chamomile or dwarf chamomile, is a low-growing, perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It possesses medicinal properties due to its essential oils, which have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and calming effects. The health benefits of Anthemis abrotanifolia include reducing anxiety and stress, soothing digestive issues, and promoting relaxation. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
